vision: Distribution framework for Claude Code skills, hooks, and project scaffold templates. Authors maintain deliverables in src/; the build pipeline packages them into release.zip for GitHub Releases install. Success at MVP: an end user can install the toolset into their own project and get a complete, working agentic workflow (orchestrator + planner + router + coding patterns) plus a high-quality agent context (CLAUDE.md family) without manual assembly. Vision derived from repo CLAUDE.md/README by /ts-project:plan --new — correct here if wrong.

releases.name: MVP
releases.goal: End users who run ts-project-init-advisor get the golden agent-context template set (CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, .claude/CLAUDE.md, .claude/goverance_CLAUDE.md, .github/copilot-instructions.md) — created directly where absent, recommended as MODIFY tasks where files already exist. Goal derived by --sync; human amends as needed.
exit_criteria: Advisor run in a project with none of the five golden files present creates all five directly from golden templates, byte-identical to src/project_root_structure/ sources
Advisor run in a project with an existing CLAUDE.md emits a MODIFY recommendation task in PROJECT_INIT_PLAN.md and does not touch the existing file
Golden templates ship inside the advisor skill at assets/golden/, populated by a build-time sync from src/project_root_structure/, and the release build fails on parity mismatch between the two
Coexistence posture with install.sh SCAFFOLD=y documented (delegate, deprecate, or bootstrap-only)

epics.title: Golden agent-context templates, recommended-to-add by ts-project-init-advisor
epics.notes: Scope v3 (see discovery.json idea-001 notes for pivot history): absent target file → direct create from golden template (absent-only guard, no approval needed); existing target file → gap analysis vs golden emits approval-gated MODIFY task in PROJECT_INIT_PLAN.md, never auto-overwrite. Top M-risk: distinguishing intentional user customization from missing golden content. Golden set = 5 files under src/project_root_structure/: CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, .claude/CLAUDE.md, .claude/goverance_CLAUDE.md, .github/copilot-instructions.md (fifth added 2026-07-04 by user decision — copilot-instructions.md counts as agent context). Still excluded from golden set: .claude/settings.json + settings.local.json (machine/permission config, installer-patched), docs/, tasks/, .github/backend.instructions.md + frontend.instructions.md (stack-specific stubs, not universal context). TECHNICAL REQUIREMENT (2026-07-04): authoring stays in src/project_root_structure/; delivery mechanism = golden templates ship INSIDE the advisor skill package at assets/golden/, populated by a build-time sync step in the release pipeline, guarded by a parity check that fails the build when assets/golden/ differs from src/project_root_structure/. Rationale: advisor installs to .claude/skills/ on every user machine (no SCAFFOLD=y dependency, no installer re-run needed, no network fetch); assets/ is the agent-skills-spec directory for templates so skill-validator accepts it natively; dogfood mirror inherits it via the existing sync since assets/ is not exclusion-filtered. Rejected: installer copies to a well-known path (breaks for skill-only updates); runtime GitHub fetch (network dependency + version skew).

constraints: TypeScript 5.x strict ESM, Node runtime, Vitest
Skills must be self-contained — no cross-skill imports
Security gates G1/G2 always require human sign-off
Packaging goes through scripts/generate-manifest.mjs + build-release.mjs with shared exclusion filter
